parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.email,
  p.phone,
  p.date_of_birth,
  p.gender,
  p.consent_status,
  p.first_appointment_at,
  p.last_appointment_at,
  p.total_sessions,
  p.created_at,
  COUNT(a.id)::int AS total_appointments,
  COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
FROM patients p
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2
